title: Vite Preview Server
x-deprecated: The `@nx/vite:preview-server` executor is deprecated and will be removed in Nx v24. Run `nx g @nx/vite:convert-to-inferred` to migrate to the `@nx/vite/plugin` inferred plugin. See https://nx.dev/docs/guides/tasks--caching/convert-to-inferred for details.

proxyConfig.description: Path to the proxy configuration file.

staticFilePath.description: Path where the build artifacts are located. If not provided then it will be infered from the buildTarget executor options as outputPath

watch.description: Enable re-building when files change. If not specified, watch mode will be enabled by default.
